vbpSection.body: Vero Beach Pediatrics raised a generation of Vero kids. Vero Beach Adult Medicine is the next chapter — built with the same family resemblance and the same belief that great primary care belongs here, for every stage of life.

servicesSection.subhead: A complete practice for adults — preventive, proactive, and personal.

ctaStrip.subhead: Schedule your first visit in minutes. Same coastline, same family — a practice built for the way you actually live.

principles.body: Same-day callbacks. Same-week visits. A panel small enough that your doctor remembers your last conversation, not just your chart.
Light-filled rooms. Coastal art. A practice that reads like a hospitality brand — because that's how primary care should feel in 2026.
Real relationships with the specialists, hospitals, and labs Vero patients already trust. Care that fits your life on this coast.

positioning.body1: Vero Beach Pediatrics raised this town's children. Vero Beach Adult Medicine is the practice for the adults they grew into — and for the parents and professionals who chose Vero because the natural beauty quietly runs everything here.
positioning.body2: Not a clinic at the end of a hospital hallway. A practice. With doors that open onto the same light Vero locals already love, and a panel small enough that your doctor remembers your last conversation, not just your chart.

hero.lede: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is a small-panel primary care practice built around one idea: that good medicine is proactive, not reactive. We see adult patients for the full picture — annual well visits, preventive screenings, chronic disease management, and acute care — with the same doctor, every time. Most insurance accepted. No membership fee.

homeServices.title: Annual Physicals & Wellness
homeServices.body: Comprehensive yearly exams that go beyond a checklist — bloodwork, screenings, and a real conversation.

homeServices.title: Chronic Condition Management
homeServices.body: Hypertension, diabetes, thyroid, cholesterol — managed proactively with a doctor who knows your history.

homeServices.title: Same-Day Sick Visits
homeServices.body: Direct line to the practice. Same-day appointments when you need them. No waiting-room marathon.

homeServices.title: Women's & Men's Health
homeServices.body: Annual exams, hormone health, perimenopause care, men's wellness — handled with care, not a checklist.

homeServices.title: Preventive Screenings & Labs
homeServices.body: Onsite labs, in-house bloodwork, and modern screening protocols built around your stage of life.

homeServices.title: Travel & Lifestyle Medicine
homeServices.body: Pre-travel consults, vaccines, sleep, performance, and longevity — care that fits how you actually live.
